objective: Cycle 15 — Bug hunt C14 (0 bugs) + feat run_history population + echo_memory + minigame/ogham counters

Feature: run_history population in store_run.gd. Each run end appends a 9-field entry (biome, cards_played, victory, life_at_end, dominant_faction, minigames_won, oghams_used, anam_earned, timestamp) to meta.run_history, trimmed to 50. Added minigames_won/oghams_used counters to run state. record_minigame_win() in merlin_store.gd wired to game controller (score >= 80). oghams_used incremented on successful ogham activation. 3 files modified, 71 lines added. 25 total bugs fixed across 15 cycles.
